title: panicum longiloreum
intro: Panicum longiloreum, also known as 'River grass' or 'Koduru', is a type of perennial grass native to tropical Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine for various health issues. The health benefits of Panicum longiloreum include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Panicum longiloreum often involve boiling the roots or leaves to create infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
